Control Description: Manage system accounts (create, activate, modify, disable, and remove).
Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources.

Control Description: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users.
Ransomware Recovery Task: Enforce phishing-resistant MFA for all servers.

Control Description: Implement an incident handling capability for security incidents.
Comments/Evidence: Validated by UH Information Security Task Force.

Control Description: Monitor and control communications at external and internal boundaries.
Ransomware Recovery Task: Move sensitive servers to UH ITS Data Center.

Control Description: Develop and maintain an inventory of system components.

Control Description: Provide basic security awareness training to system users.
Ransomware Recovery Task: 100% completion of ISAT and RST modules.

Control Description: Conduct backups of user-level and system-level information.
Ransomware Recovery Task: Immutable backups for historical epidemiology data.

Control Description: Determine that the system is capable of generating audit records.
